title: Comfy Cubs Muslin Swaddle Blankets Pack of 4, Soft Cotton 119 x 119 cm - Sun, Rainbow, Rain, Doodle
features: Soft and Gentle Baby Muslin Swaddle Blankets: Made from premium muslin cotton, this muslin baby blanket is soft, breathable, and gentle on your baby’s delicate skin, perfect for all seasons.
Large Muslin Blanket: Designed for secure swaddling, tummy time, stroller shading, or even as a spacious play mat, these versatile muslin swaddles ensure convenience and comfort every day.
Breathable Baby Blanket: Comfy Cubs baby muslin swaddle keep your baby cosy in cooler weather and allow airflow during warmer months, providing comfort while handling spills and messes with ease.
Thoughtful Gifts for Baby Shower: A practical yet stylish choice for expectant parents, this 4-pack thick baby blanket set offers functionality, durability, and charm - great for gifting.

Adorable Unisex Muslin Blankets Designs: Featuring soft, neutral colours and charming patterns, this swaddling blanket is a cute addition to any nursery or baby wardrobe, blending seamlessly with your style.
